# Practic - Playwright Testing Project

This is a Playwright testing project for end-to-end testing automation.

## Project Guidelines

- Use Playwright for browser automation and testing
- Tests are located in the `tests/` directory
- Configuration is defined in `playwright.config.js`
- Run tests with `npm test`
- Use Page Object Model pattern for test organization when possible

## Testing Guidelines

- Write tests for critical user workflows
- Use descriptive test names
- Include proper assertions and error handling
- Run tests in all browsers (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
